modules.name: Secure Object-Oriented Programming
modules.description: Secure object-oriented programming in Java: encapsulation as a defensive trust boundary, secure dependency injection, defensive functional style, secure data classes, security code smells, and adversarial input testing.

lessons.title: Encapsulation as Defense
topics: Private state and information hiding as a security boundary
Sealed classes to constrain the type hierarchy

lessons.title: Lambdas & Functional Style for Defensive Code
topics: Functional style for immutable, side-effect-free logic

lessons.title: Data Classes & Secure Object Design
topics: Records / data classes with secure invariants
Validation at construction; keeping objects always-valid

lessons.title: Security Code Smells
topics: Refactoring insecure OOP code toward secure design

modules.name: Capstone Extension
modules.description: A self-contained capstone that applies the module's secure-OOP practices to one integrated project — separate from and additive to the base Java OOP capstone.

lessons.title: Secure OOP Capstone Extension
topics: Applies the secure-OOP practices from Module 1 to one integrated, vulnerable-on-purpose funds-transfer service
Harden every class and turn an adversarial test suite from red to green
Separate, additive assessment (CBR + evidence map) from the base Java OOP capstone
